sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19271" key="ballaxra/dai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαλλαχράδαι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n19271.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pear-throwers, nickname among boys at Argos,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.303a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
